title: Todo CRUD — full lifecycle
description: A minimal CRUD mock for todo items. Demonstrates dbo seeding, POST with auto-id, PATCH partial update, DELETE with 204, and proper status codes via setExitCode/throwError. Good template to copy when scaffolding a generic CRUD entity.
dbo: { items: [{ id: 1, title: 'Try VirtualService', done: false }, { id: 2, title: 'Read expressions reference', done: true }] }

calls.description: Get a single todo by id. 404 if missing.
Create a new todo. Body: { title: string, done?: boolean }. Returns 201.
Partial update. Body may contain { title?, done? }.
Delete a todo. Returns 204 on success, 404 if missing.
